user_query: I want to get better at playing piano. Add a new learning project called 'Piano Practice' and add a task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

fields.title: Practice scales (30 minutes)
fields.description: Practice piano scales for 30 minutes every day

insertion_point.reasoning: User requested a new learning project 'Piano Practice' with a daily practice task; place the task as a child of that project and append it. Marked as Todo with daily due date and medium priority appropriate for a regular practice habit.
